query:
INSERT INTO dcsn_nodes (nodeNumber, name, title, cell, recruitedByNode, recruitedByName, activationDate, relation, role, intel, access, level, day, phase, dcsnStatus, notes) VALUES
(0, 'Nigel Dearden', 'The Architect', 'ALL', NULL, NULL, '2026-01-01', 'self', 'Founder / System Author', 'HUMINT / COMINT / SIGINT', 'TOP SECRET', 'Lv.5 — ARCHITECT', 137, 1, 'activated', 'Ir. Nigel T. Dearden, CEng, C.WEM, RPE (CSB), MICE, MHKIE. Chartered civil and structural engineer, chartered water and environmental manager. 36 years practice (1989-2026). Hong Kong based 33 years (1993-2026). Creator of Infrastructure Academy and The Reality Engine.'),
(2, 'Henry Leong', 'Network Architect — Dinosaurs to AI', 'Dinosaurs To AI Future', 0, 'Nigel Dearden', '2026-02-15', 'colleague', 'Network Architect — First H-Tetra (3 groups)', 'HUMINT / COMINT', 'SECRET', 'Lv.3 — ARTISAN (9x network)', 102, 1, 'activated', 'Network Architect. First H-Tetra across 3 groups. Also in: Projections Into the Future / Infra:infrastructure-academy. Uncle of Khanh Huynh (Node 018).'),
(18, 'Khanh Huynh', 'Marketing Intelligence — DCSN', 'Dinosaurs To AI Future', 2, 'Henry Leong', '2026-03-03', 'nephew of Node 002', 'Market Analyst / Beta Tester', 'HUMINT / COMINT / MARKINT', 'SECRET', 'Lv.2 — APPRENTICE', 21, 1, 'activated', 'Age 22, Sacramento CA, USA. BSc Marketing (Summa Cum Laude, Dec 2025). MSc Marketing Intelligence (Fall 2026). Co-founder micro-distillery Vietnam. Board member Young Professionals Alliance. Event marketing 7000+ attendees. Nephew of Henry Leong (Node 002). Also in: Projections Into the Future / Infra:infrastructure-academy.');
